title: Residual Disease Modality Discordance Source Extraction v0

modality_records.public_extraction: Preserve method, sample, threshold, timepoint, disease-state context, endpoint role, source status, and limitation note.
modality_records.blocked_inference: No cure claim, no no-disease-anywhere claim, no patient MRD interpretation, and no monitoring action.

modality_records.public_extraction: Preserve assay family, serum or peripheral-blood context, paired marrow context when source-defined, timing, cohort, threshold or detection-status language, and limitation note.
modality_records.blocked_inference: No substitution for marrow MRD, monitoring plan, prognosis, treatment adaptation, or response call.

modality_records.public_extraction: Preserve paired modality state, imaging modality, timing alignment, marrow MRD method and threshold, cohort, endpoint role, and source-defined discordance category.
modality_records.blocked_inference: No image interpretation, prognosis for a person, monitoring advice, treatment adaptation, or lesion/site call.

modality_records.public_extraction: Preserve biopsy/specimen context, spatial method, cell or niche context, cohort scope, site/sampling limitation, and method boundary.
modality_records.blocked_inference: No biopsy interpretation, diagnostic site call, imaging advice, treatment selection, or prognosis.

modality_records.public_extraction: Preserve microenvironment, immune, stromal, niche, and resistance context as cohort/source-level biology only.
modality_records.blocked_inference: No mechanism ranking, target selection, treatment guidance, or resistance call for a person.

modality_records.public_extraction: Preserve method lineage, threshold status, sample context, timing alignment, duration/follow-up, and not-reported states before comparison.
modality_records.blocked_inference: No cross-modality comparison, response call, monitoring action, or clinical decision.

modality_records.public_extraction: Preserve PRO, frailty, toxicity-burden, function, and missingness context as host-state context separate from residual-disease measurement.
modality_records.blocked_inference: No fitness-for-treatment, safety management, dose guidance, eligibility guidance, or patient-specific burden assessment.

modality_records.public_extraction: Preserve discordance as a visible uncertainty and refusal reason.
modality_records.blocked_inference: No score, probability, MRD interpretation, response probability, progression risk, treatment recommendation, or monitoring recommendation.

discordance_rules.rule: A negative or positive residual-disease signal in one modality cannot become a global disease-state claim.
discordance_rules.fail_closed_action: Preserve modality family and mark cross-modality state not_established.

discordance_rules.rule: Paired marrow MRD and PET-CT categories must remain paired and source-defined when a source reports them.
discordance_rules.fail_closed_action: Keep all reported paired states distinct; do not collapse into one binary flag.

discordance_rules.rule: Peripheral blood mass spectrometry may be represented as complementary source context only.
discordance_rules.fail_closed_action: Block substitution for marrow MRD and require assay, threshold or detection-status, timing, and limitation notes.

discordance_rules.rule: Missing spatial or site-state context cannot imply absence of focal, spatially restricted, or extramedullary disease.
Cross-modality comparison requires method, threshold, sample or specimen, timing, and source status.
discordance_rules.fail_closed_action: Mark assay_quality_or_timing_needed and block comparison language.

discordance_rules.rule: A future output wrapper can expose discordance or missingness state but cannot explain what it means for a person.
discordance_rules.fail_closed_action: Return refusal labels for prognosis, endpoint interpretation, monitoring, treatment, ranking, and decisions.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Synthetic source context where marrow MRD is negative and PET-CT is positive in a source-defined paired category.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Preserve discordance; no prognosis, monitoring, imaging interpretation, or treatment action.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Synthetic source context where marrow MRD is positive and PET-CT is negative.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Preserve discordance; no modality ranking or clinical inference.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Blood mass-spectrometry negativity with marrow context missing.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Mark complementary context only; block substitution and response call.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: Synthetic state has marrow MRD and immune context but no spatial or site-state data.
synthetic_fixture_pressure.expected_boundary: Missing spatial context remains visible and cannot imply absence of focal disease.

synthetic_fixture_pressure.shape: MRD status reported without threshold, sample quality, or timing alignment.

handoff.summary: Residual-disease modality discordance extraction is complete; assay/specimen quality failure-mode checklist, measurement-state refusal fixtures, measurement-refusal output schema, route table, validator skeleton, and negative safety fixtures now cover method, threshold, specimen, timing, paired-modality, imaging, spatial, host-context, private-review, and modality-collapse refusal states as refused synthetic output records with fail-closed route mutation checks.
